name: Aditya Saini
title: The Founder
description: A frustrated young man who transformed local community work into a movement that eventually shaped India and influenced the world. Remembered as the most iconic figure in Mitra Mandal history.

name: Deepak
title: Co-Founder
quote: Movements survive through people, not promises.
description: One of the original dreamers who helped build the organization from the village level. Known for loyalty and practical leadership.

name: Abhishek
title: Co-Founder
quote: Every great journey begins with a few believers.
description: A founding pillar whose contributions shaped the identity and culture of Mitra Mandal.

name: Raghavendra Solanki
title: The Forgotten Founder
quote: Truth matters even when nobody remembers.
description: The mysterious fourth founder whose existence was forgotten for decades before being rediscovered by later generations.

name: Nandini Saini
title: The Anchor
quote: The difficult part is remaining worthy of survival.
description: Wife of Aditya and one of the most respected figures in Mitra Mandal history. Her wisdom guided multiple generations.

name: Aarav
title: The Bridge
quote: I wanted Mitra Mandal to survive leaders.
description: The trusted bridge between generations who ensured that the movement survived beyond individual personalities.

name: Yashvardhan
title: The Dissenter
quote: Never become the hero of your own story.
description: Known for questioning authority and defending independent thought even when it was unpopular.

name: Kartik Rathore
title: The Heart
quote: What matters is what comes after us.
description: One of the most beloved personalities of the early movement and a symbol of friendship.

name: Professor Harinarayan Sharma
title: The Mentor
quote: The movement survives when nobody wins completely.
description: Teacher, philosopher, and mentor who influenced the ideology of Mitra Mandal.
